rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 1, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 6. Defendant The Boeing Co.¿s demurrer to plaintiffs¿ second amended complaint is overruled in its entirety. Plaintiffs¿ complaint alleges facts sufficient to state the second, fourth and fifth causes of action. Defendant has 10 days to respond to the second amended complaint. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 1, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 6. rulings.Case Title: MARION KOSICH et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Consolidate Successor In Interest Action (Cgc-06-458226) With Wrongful Death And Successor In Interest Action (Cgc-10-275663); And Motion To Vacate Or Continue Trial Date Of Case No. Cgc-06-458226
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 1, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 9. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion to consolidate cases and to vacate the trial date in case no. 458226 is granted per plaintiffs¿ conditional non-opposition. Cases numbered 458226 and 275663 are consolidated. Henceforth, all papers shall be filed and served under case number 458226. The trial date for case no. 458226 is vacated. The consolidated actions will be on the August 18, 2011 status and setting conference date. The court originally issued this tentative ruling last week, and no parties gave notice of an intent to contest it. = (220/HEK)
